---
name: Test failure
about: One or more Vitest unit or smoke tests failed (Stage 4).
title: "[Tests] "
labels: ["ci-failure", "tests"]
---

## What failed
A Vitest test failed. Unit tests gate the feature → main PR; build-artifact smoke tests gate the staging / production promotions.

## Details
- Suite (unit / smoke):
- Test name:
- Test file / line:
- Error:
- Commit:
